traits.name: Adhesive (Object Form Only)
traits.description: The mimic adheres to anything that touches it. A Huge or smaller creature adhered to the mimic is also Grappled by it (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have Disadvantage.

traits.name: False Appearance (Object Form Only)
traits.description: While the mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

traits.name: Grappler
traits.description: The mimic has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature Grappled by it.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The mimic makes two Pseudopod attacks.

actions.name: Pseudopod
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the mimic is in object form, the target is Grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target has the Restrained condition, and the mimic can't use its pseudopod on another target.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Acid damage.

tactical_info.environment: Dungeons, treasure rooms, abandoned structures, anywhere valuable objects might be found
tactical_info.tactics: Disguises as valuable object to lure prey, grapples with adhesive pseudopods, advantage against grappled foes
tactical_info.weaknesses: Very slow movement, vulnerable when revealed, limited to object-based ambush tactics
